Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python scripts/check_secrets.py --history`
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated where needed
- [ ] No API keys, private datasets, sensitive paths, or generated confidential reports included
- [ ] Predictions remain labeled as proposals requiring real experimental confirmation
